title: Revert "[ImportVerilog] Add initial virtual interface lowering (#9904)"
body: This reverts commit 40fb410ea3fca1e2deb0329282e7c182f9d64a5f. CI started failing after landing this on main. @AmurG, can you re-open this PR and rebase on the current main? There may be some breakages that have snuck in while the PR was open. Thanks!
